Infectum.turoyo: hano u=sobo ko-mšayəl u=ṭaboxo ʕal u=dayroyo naʕimo w-ko-mṣaʕal-le
translations: this old [monk] asked the cook about the young monk and abused him

Infectum.turoyo: 5; b-u=ḥal-ano hənnək ku-mṣaʕri l-ḥḏoḏe, u=ṭaboxo ko-mbalaġ-ġe šlome
translations: ‘Thus, they would abuse each other [and] the cook would send them regards’; 42/8;

Infectum.turoyo: fayəš ko-mṣaʕro l-ruḥa w-l-i=saʕa d-ḥzela eba u=kačalōk
translations: ‘She began to scold herself and the hour when she had seen the bald-headed’; 44/115

Infectum-wa.turoyo: i=naqqa d-marfan-wo aq=qarqure qum d-a=ʕwone, u=qarqur-ano mṣaʕar-wo
translations: wenn sie die Lämmer zu den Mutterschafen liessen, schimpfte dieses Lamm immer
es ist unmöglich. Sie würde meinen Vater nicht beschimpfen

Infectum-wa.turoyo: gəd-oṯe l-gabi me-darbe d-ono əzzí l-gabe, w-bəṯṯər m-aqqa ṣ=ṣurʕ-anək d-mṣaʕár-wayno-le
translations: ‘He will come to me instead of me coming to him after those insults with which I used to abuse him’; 42/14

Imperative.turoyo: Zax w itax ḥeḏorayye, mbasamme w ṣaʕar elan, balki ṭəlbilax.

translations: Go and come around them, try to please them and swear at us, maybe they will ask you in marriage.

stems.label_raw:
II: mṣaʕaḷḷe/mṣaʕər

ausschelten, schimpfen;

lemma_header_raw: ṣʕr (< MEA ṣʕr (Pa.) cf. SL 1296: to insult, abuse;)
